today.descriptionToday: A small postcard of light, kept for you.
today.descriptionLatest: Until today’s sky arrives, this evening is waiting quietly.
today.descriptionEmpty: When the Pi chooses this evening’s photo, it will appear here.
today.emptyCard: Today’s photo has not arrived yet.

archive.recipientDescription: Every saved light, one by one.

live.requestLabel: Ask the sky for a photo

about.title: About this project
about.body: Every evening, a camera in Madrid looks west. It waits, watches, chooses. The best sunset image arrives here, with no filters, no editing, just the day’s last light over the city rooftops.
about.body2: A gift made with patience, code, and many sunlit evenings.

login.title: I was waiting for you
login.description: Enter your email and I’ll send you a link and a code.
login.softMessage: If Supabase can send to that address, you’ll receive a code shortly.
login.linkExpired: The link has expired or was already used. Request a new code.
login.sendFailed: Could not send the code. Please try again in a moment.

verify.title: Almost in
verify.description: Open the email link, or type the code sent to {email}.
verify.invalidCode: That code is incorrect or has expired.
